title: Olivia Dean, Katseye, Addison Rae and Fellow Best New Artist Nominees Showcase Their Talent in Grammy Medley
text: Eight rising artists participated in a medley celebrating the 2026 Best New Artist category at the Grammy Awards held at Los Angeles' Crypto.com Arena. Host Trevor Noah highlighted that these nominees had accumulated more than 27 billion combined streams last year. Olivia Dean won the Best New Artist award and performed her song Man I Need in a sparkling red dress. The article notes that the crowd audibly cheered as Dean was revealed, with her groovy performance demonstrating her current popularity as a recording artist. The Marias opened with No One Noticed, Addison Rae performed Fame is a Gun from a box truck backstage, Katseye performed Gnarly as a coordinated six-member group, and Leon Thomas, Alex Warren, Lola Young, and Sombr also participated in the performance block.
